sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Good, the board is reset. Now let me try the warm/cool color split hypothesis:
- Red container (warm colors): O, R, Y (3 colors)
- Green container (cool colors): p, b, N, M (4 colors)
Palette positions: R=10, p=17, N=24, O=31, M=38, b=45, Y=52
Red container slots: (22, 22), (22, 28), (22, 40)
Green container slots: (36, 22), (36, 28), (36, 34), (36, 40)
For red container (warm): O, R, Y
For green container (cool): p, b, N, M
Let me fill:
- Red slot 1 (22, 22): O
- Red slot 2 (22, 28): R
- Red slot 3 (22, 40): Y
- Green slot 1 (36, 22): p
- Green slot 2 (36, 28): b
- Green slot 3 (36, 34): N
- Green slot 4 (36, 40): M
Then SPACE to check.

    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 45},  # b

    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 38},  # M

]

action(fill_warm_cool)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
